description: Authoritative model policy for all AInchors agents. Warden enforces this. Changes require Ken approval + CHG entry + baseline update.

main.escalationRule: High-stakes tasks or 2x failure only. Ken must approve or task must qualify per RULES.md.
main.ollamaCloudConstraint: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) crons only. No PII, no medical, no legal. AInchors own ops only.
main.rationale: US11 model strategy. Sonnet is default. Opus for escalation only. Gemma4:e2b for background crons. Ollama Cloud Tier 2 (kimi/deepseek) for non-sensitive cron tasks (CHG-0140).
main._configFormat: CHG-0270: openclaw.json .model is now {primary, fallbacks} object. Compare against .model.primary only.
main._interimNote: CHG-0348: Interim models during Claude API credit outage. Valid: kimi, gemma4, deepseek-pro, deepseek-flash

business.escalationRule: No Opus. Aria never escalates to Opus — cost control for business stream.
business.ollamaCloudConstraint: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) crons only. No PII, no medical, no legal. AInchors internal ops only — never client data.
business.rationale: CHG-0037 + Option C decision 2026-04-27. Gemma4 cold-load prohibited. Sonnet for Aria interactive. Opus prohibited — cost control. Ollama Cloud Tier 2 added for non-sensitive business ops crons (CHG-0140).
business.fallbackNote: CHG-0075: Haiku-only fallback. Opus prohibited. Gemma4 prohibited in interactive. If Anthropic down → standby mode.
business._configFormat: CHG-0270: openclaw.json .model is now {primary, fallbacks} object. Compare against .model.primary only.
business._interimNote: CHG-0348: Interim models during Claude API credit outage. Valid: kimi, gemma4, deepseek-pro, deepseek-flash

security.escalationRule: No escalation. Security reviews must be consistent and cost-controlled.
security.rationale: Governance agents run Sonnet for consistency. No Opus (cost), no Gemma4 (quality risk for security reviews). CHG-0193: switched to Haiku (cost saving, approved Ken 2026-05-07).
security.note: Switched to Haiku 2026-05-06 — Ken cost optimisation. Descriptive/review tasks only.
security._configFormat: CHG-0270: openclaw.json .model is now {primary, fallbacks} object. Compare against .model.primary only.
security._interimNote: CHG-0348: Interim models during Claude API credit outage. Valid: kimi, gemma4, deepseek-pro, deepseek-flash

legal.escalationRule: No escalation. Sonnet is sufficient for all legal reviews — Ken confirmed 2026-04-28. Opus exception removed.
legal.exceptionReason: Exception removed 2026-04-28. Ken confirmed Sonnet sufficient for legal reviews.
legal.rationale: Ken confirmed Sonnet sufficient. Opus exception removed 2026-04-28. Ollama Cloud explicitly prohibited — legal content is sensitive. No external cloud for legal reviews. CHG-0140 audit. CHG-0193: switched to Haiku (cost saving, approved Ken 2026-05-07).
legal.note: Switched to Haiku 2026-05-06 — Ken cost optimisation. Descriptive/review tasks only.
legal._configFormat: CHG-0270: openclaw.json .model is now {primary, fallbacks} object. Compare against .model.primary only.
legal._interimNote: CHG-0348: Interim models during Claude API credit outage. Valid: kimi, gemma4, deepseek-pro, deepseek-flash

qa.escalationRule: No escalation. QA reviews must be consistent and cost-controlled.
qa.ollamaCloudConstraint: Non-sensitive content QA only (blog posts, marketing copy, internal docs). Not for reviewing content that may contain PII or client data.
qa.rationale: Governance agents run Sonnet for consistency. Ollama Cloud (kimi, deepseek-flash) allowed for non-sensitive content QA crons — CHG-0140. CHG-0193: switched to Haiku (cost saving, approved Ken 2026-05-07).
qa.note: Switched to Haiku 2026-05-06 — Ken cost optimisation. Descriptive/review tasks only.
qa._configFormat: CHG-0270: openclaw.json .model is now {primary, fallbacks} object. Compare against .model.primary only.
qa._interimNote: CHG-0348: Interim models during Claude API credit outage. Valid: kimi, gemma4, deepseek-pro, deepseek-flash

spark.escalationRule: Sonnet fallback when Ollama Cloud unavailable or for high-stakes content requiring approval.
spark.ollamaCloudConstraint: Social content, marketing copy, strategy, campaigns only. No client PII. AInchors own content only.
spark.dataConstraints: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) only. Social/marketing content. Never client PII.
spark.rationale: CHG-0130. kimi-k2.6:cloud primary — fastest (6.8s), best creative quality (4.6/5), ideal for social content. deepseek-pro for complex strategy analysis. Sonnet fallback. Opus prohibited (cost). Gemma4 prohibited (quality).
spark._configFormat: CHG-0270: openclaw.json .model is now {primary, fallbacks} object. Compare against .model.primary only.
spark._interimNote: CHG-0348: Interim models during Claude API credit outage. Valid: kimi, gemma4, deepseek-pro, deepseek-flash

governance.escalationRule: Warden never escalates. Lightweight compliance checks only.
governance.ollamaCloudConstraint: Warden reads config files and model IDs only — inherently non-sensitive. deepseek-flash approved for compliance check crons.
governance.rationale: Lightweight compliance monitor. Haiku primary (CHG-0096). deepseek-flash approved for cron compliance checks (non-sensitive config reads). Sonnet fallback. CHG-0140.
governance._configFormat: CHG-0270: openclaw.json .model is now {primary, fallbacks} object. Compare against .model.primary only.
governance._interimNote: CHG-0348: Interim models during Claude API credit outage. Valid: kimi, gemma4, deepseek-pro, deepseek-flash

infra.description: Forge 🏗️ — Infra/Ops Agent (platform ops + CI continuous improvement)
infra.escalationRule: No escalation. Ops tasks are deterministic. CI uses deepseek-pro as primary CI model.
infra.ollamaCloudConstraint: CI tasks only (non-sensitive model benchmarking). Never client data.
infra.rationale: Haiku for ops validation crons. deepseek-v4-pro:cloud for CI evaluation (approved CHG-0123). All Ollama Cloud = CI/internal ops only. CHG-0147.
infra._configFormat: CHG-0270: openclaw.json .model is now {primary, fallbacks} object. Compare against .model.primary only.
infra._interimNote: CHG-0348: Interim models during Claude API credit outage. Valid: kimi, gemma4, deepseek-pro, deepseek-flash

architect.escalationRule: Opus only for high-stakes architectural assessments (P2 client work, legal/regulatory architecture). Ken must approve.
architect.rationale: On-demand EA work. Sonnet default. Added to Warden monitoring scope (CHG-0258, Ken approved 2026-05-10). Option A: model compliance monitoring for T3 specialists.
architect._configFormat: CHG-0270: openclaw.json .model is now {primary, fallbacks} object. Compare against .model.primary only.
architect._interimNote: CHG-0348: Interim models during Claude API credit outage. Valid: kimi, gemma4, deepseek-pro, deepseek-flash

cronModelPolicy.description: Allowed models for cron job payloads. Gemma4 is only permitted for specific background tasks.
cronModelPolicy.promptPrefix: Answer directly. No reasoning. No explanation. Output only the answer.

changeControl.process: 1. Ken approval in webchat/Telegram. 2. Update this file. 3. Update critical-config-baseline.json. 4. Log CHG entry. 5. Update MEMORY.md.

lastApprovalContext: CHG-0140: Agent allowlist audit 2026-05-03. Ollama Cloud Tier 2 propagated to eligible agents. Spark added. Lex opus contradiction fixed. CHG-0356: gemma4:31b-cloud added to T2 (approved Ken 2026-05-16 via Telegram). gemma4:26b local removed (system slowdown).

tierStrategy.description: 4-tier model routing — Tier 1 (Sonnet), Tier 2 (Haiku + Ollama Cloud: kimi/deepseek/gemma4-31b), Tier 3 (Gemma4:e2b local), Emergency (Gemma4:26b). Approved Ken 2026-04-28, extended 2026-05-02 with Ollama Cloud Tier 2, extended 2026-05-16 with gemma4:31b-cloud.

useCases: All Ken-facing interactive responses (Yoda main session)
Anything touching external sends, financial decisions, critical ops

ollamaCloudModels.constraints: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) tasks only. No PII, no medical, no legal. Background + async tasks preferred.
Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) tasks only. No PII, no medical, no legal. Background + async tasks preferred.
useCases: Fast concurrent subtasks requiring speed over depth

ollamaCloudModels.constraints: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) tasks only. No PII, no medical, no legal. Avg latency 18.4s — suitable for async/non-realtime tasks.

ollamaCloudModels.pocPhase: Cycle 2A COMPLETE (93% pass, HIGH confidence, 4.39/5). Cycle B ACTIVE 2026-05-16: live ops-cron evaluation on Warden/Shield/Lex/Sage/Forge crons.
ollamaCloudModels.constraints: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) tasks only. No PII, no medical, no legal. Background + async tasks preferred. 31b cloud variant replaces 26b local (removed due to system slowdown).
useCases: Content generation where kimi context window insufficient
Aria bounded sub-tasks (not direct Angie conversation)
Offline fallback when Anthropic API unavailable (main/Yoda crons only)
NEVER used for Aria interactive sessions — Aria enters standby if Anthropic down

tierStrategy.approvalContext: Ken approved gemma4:31b-cloud addition to T2 via Telegram 2026-05-16 12:39 AEST. gemma4:26b local variant removed from approved list (system slowdown on OC1).

w2.description: Warden W2 — client data tier enforcement
w2.rule: Any task tagged with client_id must not use Tier 2/3 models (Ollama Cloud, Claude). Violations flagged immediately to Yoda.
w2.status: defined — enforcement implementation pending (OC2 + Docker per-client isolation)

w1_intervalTracking.rule: Every Warden run must log a timestamp to state/warden-interval-log.json. Monthly script calculates missed 15-min intervals. Target: <0.5% missed over 30 days.

byokPolicy.description: Client Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) model policy
byokPolicy.default: Clients use Ollama Cloud (Tier 2) models only — no limitations on AInchors-approved list
byokPolicy.byokOption: If client supplies own cloud API keys: no model restrictions. Nexus tracks and reports usage only.
byokPolicy.dataResidency: Data sovereignty rules apply regardless of BYOK — client data still Tier 0/1 only

_schemaNote: CHG-0270 update: use requiredPrimary field for model compliance checks. requiredModel kept for reference. Compare against openclaw.json agents.list[id].model.primary

interimPeriod.reason: CHG-0349 Claude API credit depletion — all agents on interim models (kimi/gemma4/deepseek-pro)
interimPeriod.expectedEnd: Upon CLAUDE RESTORE keyword from Ken
interimPeriod.note: Warden skips model drift checks during interim period. Drift to interim models is intentional, not a violation. All other Warden checks (obs freshness, ITIL, cost) continue normally.
